message:
feat(connectors): add comprehensive error tests and improve API handling

Anthropic connector:
- Add fcp-testkit dev dependency for LogCapture
- Add test for 529 overloaded error handling (Anthropic-specific status)
- Add test for context length exceeded (400 invalid_request_error)
- Add log redaction test ensuring API keys and prompts never leak to logs
- Add SSE parsing tests: ping events, invalid JSON, unknown event types

Discord connector:
- Rename bot_token to bot_credential for consistency
- Improve gateway reconnection logic with better state management
- Add fcp-testkit dev dependency for test infrastructure
- Enhanced error handling in API client

OpenAI connector:
- Add fcp-testkit dev dependency
- Expand client tests for error scenarios

Telegram connector:
- Refactor client polling logic
- Improve connector shutdown handling

All connectors now have consistent test infrastructure via fcp-testkit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
